name: JAK-STAT Signaling
description: JAK-STAT signaling: cytokine-induced receptor dimerization activates associated JAK kinases that phosphorylate the receptor and recruited STATs, which dimerize, enter the nucleus and drive transcription, with SOCS providing negative feedback.
mermaid:
graph TD
    N1["Cytokine binds receptor"]
    N2["Receptor dimerization"]
    N3["JAKs transphosphorylate"]
    N4["Receptor Tyr phosphorylated"]
    N5["STAT docks via SH2"]
    N6["STAT phosphorylated"]
    N7["STAT dimerizes"]
    N8["Enter nucleus; bind DNA"]
    N9["Target gene transcription"]
    N10["SOCS induced"]

    N1 --> N2
    N2 --> N3
    N3 --> N4
    N4 --> N5
    N5 --> N6

    N8 --> N9

    N10 -->|inhibit JAK| N3
